narrative:
Springboro City 2-C (precinct in Warren County) has 1,152 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.1 percentage points.
